proposal_summary: This proposal updates the Zodiac Roles Modifier to V2 to improve treasury management usability and transparency, enabling swapping on CoW Swap, updating token arrays for swapping, and removing obsolete actions and protocols.

disclosed_entities.name: Zodiac Roles Modifier module
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: This proposal aims to roll out an updated version of the Zodiac Roles Modifier module.

disclosed_entities.name: CoW Swap
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: enabling swapping actions on CoW Swap

disclosed_entities.name: Uniswap v3
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: equivalent lists replicated for Uniswap v3

disclosed_entities.name: Uniswap v2
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Uniswap v2 Swaps... Removed due to insufficient liquidity in V2 pools.

disclosed_entities.name: Stakewise v2
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Stakewise v2: Deprecated functions related to deposit

disclosed_entities.name: Compound v2
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Compound v2... Discontinued all actions targeting v2 contracts

disclosed_entities.name: Curve Pools
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Curve Pools: Addition of stETH-ng (factory) pool

disclosed_entities.name: Convex Staking
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Convex Staking Added the CVX/stETH Rewards contract.

disclosed_entities.name: Endowment Avatar Safe
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: transferred to the Endowment’s Avatar Safe

disclosed_entities.name: Testing Avatar Safe
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: we have utilised a Testing Avatar Safe

disclosed_entities.name: Roles Modifier v2 module
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Ownership of the deployed Roles Modifier v2 module

claimed_actions.raw_action: Enable module Zodiac Roles Modifier v2
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Activating the new Roles Modifier v2 module
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Upon approval, the Roles Modifier v2 module will be activated... The payload will only activate this module
All existing and outdated allowances previously set by the Endowment are revoked (set to zero).

claimed_complexity.reason: Involves updating permissions on a custom module, revoking specific allowances, and enabling a new module, but uses pre-defined smart account tooling.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: This proposal aims to roll out an updated version of the Zodiac Roles Modifier module... The payload will only activate this module, marking the first phase of the migration process. A subsequent policy update proposal will seek to disable the v1 module.

limitations: No complete list of specific contract addresses provided for all protocol updates like CoW Swap, Uniswap v3, Compound v2, etc.
